name: The Fall
oracleText:
When The Fall enters the battlefield, each player sacrifices an artifact, creature, or enchantment.
Whenever a permanent is sacrificed, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. This ability triggers only once each turn.
flavorText: "Therefore the Lord God sent him forth from the garden of Eden, to till the ground from whence he was taken." — Genesis 3:23
notes: Created from a checked Early World card list item; mechanics pending. Classics theme art uses Lucas Cranach's "The Fall of Man" via Wikimedia Commons.
